description:
Newly Upgraded

Newest 2026 HP Business Laptop Computer, 15.6" FHD Touch Display, 10-Core Intel Core i5-1334U (Up to 4.6 GHz), Intel Iris Xe Graphics, Up to 64GB RAM + 2TB SSD, Numeric Keypad, Wi-Fi 6, Privacy Webcam, Windows 11 Pro

Free Lifetime Microsoft Office

Fast Shipping / Free Shipping within 48 Contiguous States

Product Overview

  • Recommended Memory Upgrade: Adding memory (RAM) to your computer can instantly make your computer faster, increase system responsiveness, and make multitasking seamless. Boost your computer's performance with RAM upgrade of 12GB/16GB/32GB/64GB RAM.
  • Recommended Storage Upgrade: Upgrade your storage capacity and unleash blazing-fast performance with our SSD options from 256GB/512GB/1TB/2TB, ensuring you have the space and speed to tackle any task with ease.
  • Intel Core i5-1334U: Up to 4.6 GHz Max Boost Clock, 12 MB L3 Cache, 10 cores, 12 threads. 13th Gen Intel Core processor distributes performance where you need it the most — saving you time and increasing your ability to do the things you actually want.
  • Windows 11 Pro: Protect your data with enterprise-grade security, login from any device anywhere, and boost productivity with powerful management tools.
  • Free Microsoft Office Pro Plus 2024: Free lifetime Office bundle including Word, Excel, OneNote, Outlook, PowerPoint, Access. Office 2024 is pre-installed and activated. Key is not needed and provided. Please DO NOT accept Microsoft 365 trial, which may invalidate the Office 2024 license.
  • FHD Touch Display: Reach out and control your PC with just a touch. Being able to pinch, zoom, tap, and swipe right from the screen makes interacting with your computer a totally intuitive experience.
  • Wireless Connectivity: Wi-Fi 6 and Bluetooth 5.4 combo.
  • For Home, Student, Professionals, Small Business, School Education, and Commercial Enterprise. Online Class, Google Classroom, Remote Learning, Zoom Ready.

Choose your upgrades

We specialize in providing professional upgrades and customization for computers. Note that if you opt for customization of your computer from the aforementioned list, our engineers will open the manufacturer's box to install upgrades and test the system.

  • Upgrade Memory for Multi-tasking: 12GB/16GB/32GB/64GB DDR4 SDRAM
  • Upgrade SSD for Storage and Speed: 256GB/512GB/1TB/2TB NVMe SSD
